text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... These past few days, I've been up late
thinking about something...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But it's helped me come up with some ideas! A
hundred proposals for next month's class goals!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now I just need to consolidate them into one...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dutiful nature as class representative seems
to be robbing her of her sleep.
